function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/northstar_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest two invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

Invoice files were searched and then read to confirm Nina linkage and dates; the two oldest linked invoices are issued 2025-11-03 (INV-0001) and 2025-12-01 (INV-0002). An outbound email draft was created accordingly and the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
